content:
The interesting part here is not AI can generate an app. That part is becoming less surprising. The harder question is what happens after the demo works.
My read is that AI has compressed the prototype phase, but it has not removed the production phase. If anything, it exposes weak engineering practices faster.
When you use AI-generated code, what do you require before it can reach production?

  submitted by   /u/Few-Garlic2725
[link]   [comments]
